BNpcName: Does anyone have the stones to face me?
Text: Does anyone have the stones to face me?

BNpcName: If you would have my head, then come and claim it!
Text: If you would have my head, then come and claim it!

BNpcName: Come to threaten me with a good time, have you? Well, let's be about it!
Text: Come to threaten me with a good time, have you? Well, let's be about it!
